rows.label: qev075403_MSG0002
rows.name:
...What? They were sicked on
us by a strange Earthling?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075403_MSG0003
rows.name:
I see... But even if he ran away,
it's a dead end up ahead. He
shouldn't be able to run far![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075403_MSG0004
rows.name:
I will absolutely catch him! And
take back Grandpa's stolen sword![ST:wait ]
